title: Marcus Makes Morning Sounds
synopsis: Little Marcus discovers all the wonderful sounds that fill his family's cozy Sunday morning routine, from sizzling pancakes to rustling newspapers.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up on Sunday morning. The sun is warm and golden. What sounds does Marcus hear?

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits up in his crib in cozy pajamas. Golden morning sunlight streams through the window, casting warm light across the nursery.
illustration.alt: Marcus waking up in his crib on a sunny Sunday morning

pages.text: Sizzle, sizzle! Daddy makes pancakes in the kitchen. Pop, pop! The pancakes bubble and flip.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes watches from his high chair as his father cooks pancakes on the stove. Steam rises from the pan and golden sunlight fills the kitchen.
illustration.alt: Marcus watching daddy make pancakes that sizzle and pop

pages.text: Rustle, rustle! Mama reads the newspaper. Crinkle, crinkle! The pages turn softly.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits on his mother's lap as she reads a newspaper. Morning light streams in, and they're both in comfortable pajamas on the couch.
illustration.alt: Marcus and mama reading the newspaper together

pages.text: Mmm, mmm! Marcus eats his pancakes. Clap, clap! He claps his hands happily. Sunday morning sounds are the best!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits in his high chair clapping his hands with pancake pieces on his tray. His parents smile nearby in the sunlit kitchen, everyone in cozy pajamas.
illustration.alt: Marcus clapping happily while eating pancakes with his family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: Pancakes sizzle and pop when they cook in the pan!

questions.question: What does Marcus do with his hands?
questions.explanation: Marcus claps his hands happily when he eats his pancakes!

questions.question: What does Mama read?
questions.explanation: Mama reads the newspaper and it makes rustle and crinkle sounds!
